testcase.name: SauceDemo Cart > adding an item updates the cart badge to 1
testcase.system-out: console.log: Added Sauce Labs Backpack — badge: 1 ✓

testcase.name: SauceDemo Cart > removing an item decrements the cart badge
testcase.system-out: console.log: Added 2 items, badge=2; removed Bike Light, badge=1 ✓

testcase.name: SauceDemo Cart > cart page shows correct price for added item
SauceDemo Login > valid credentials redirect to inventory page
SauceDemo Login > locked out user sees error banner
testcase.system-out: console.log: Error: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out. ✓

testcase.name: SauceDemo Login > empty username shows validation error
testcase.failure:
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) Expected: "Epic sadface: Username is required" Received: "Epic sadface: Username is required!"
at tests/login.test.js:39:20
testcase.system-out: console.error: Trailing ! found in error banner text — assertion failed
